message:
fix(ui): keyboard safety for query input, Unicode boundaries, and detail modal UX

TUI keyboard input safety (app.rs):

- Guard update-banner shortcuts (Shift+U, Shift+N, Shift+S) so they only
  fire when the query input is empty.  Previously typing a capital letter
  (e.g. "U" for a search term) while the update banner was visible would
  trigger the upgrade/notes/skip action instead of inserting the character.

- Guard inspector overlay single-char shortcuts (m, c, e) so they do not
  fire when the user is in Query input mode on the Search surface.  This
  prevents the inspector from stealing keystrokes while the user is
  actively typing a search query with the overlay visible.

- When the detail modal is open and an unrecognized letter key is pressed,
  close the modal, focus the search bar, and forward the keystroke to the
  query input.  This prevents bare-letter keypresses from being silently
  consumed and creates a natural "start typing to search" flow from the
  detail view.  Backspace (empty QueryChanged) does not trigger this
  behavior, preserving the ability to use backspace within the modal.

- Remove the keyboard shortcut hint from the query lane status bar
  (was showing "(Tab)" next to search/match mode indicators) to reduce
  visual clutter.

Unicode boundary fixes:

- app.rs: Use ceil_char_boundary when truncating display paths to prevent
  panicking on multi-byte UTF-8 characters at the truncation point.
- wizard.rs: Use floor_char_boundary when truncating topic previews to
  30 characters to avoid splitting multi-byte sequences.

New tests:

- query_changed_backspace_removes_full_unicode_scalar: verifies that
  backspace on "e-acute + smiley" removes one full scalar at a time.
- cursor_moved_advances_by_unicode_boundaries: verifies that cursor
  movement over "a + smiley + b" lands on correct byte offsets.
- detail_modal_unrecognized_letter_closes_modal_and_forwards_to_query:
  verifies the close-and-forward behavior with focus assertion.
- detail_modal_backspace_does_not_close_modal: verifies stability.
- Updated cockpit_c_key, cockpit_m_key, and cockpit_e_key tests to
  use Analytics surface to avoid the new Search-surface typing guard.

Analytics charts (analytics_charts.rs):

- Clarify heatmap cell gap comments: 1px column gap, no row gap.
  The fh calculation was already correct (saturating_sub(0) is a no-op);
  simplify to just cast without the redundant subtraction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
